br_count_qa.details:
All 71 records have matching
count between EN and VI

field_qa.notes: All speaker labels (エルミア, 盗賊A, <user>) kept byte-identical

translation_qa.user_tag_handled: <user> lines use Chỉ Huy in VI (3 occurrences: seq37 Elmia line, seq47 narration, and implicit in seq seq 1/3/7/12/16/18/19/22/24/25/32/34/38/39/40/42/51/52/56/57/59/60/62/66/68)
translation_qa.addressing_consistency: Elmia: tôi ↔ Chỉ Huy: anh/cô; Thief: tao/mày ↔ Elmia/Chỉ Huy: mày/bọn mày

character_voices.エルミア: Self-confident elf archer, uses standard tôi. Touchy about body image complaints. Uses Chỉ Huy when addressing Commander directly.
character_voices.盗賊A: Rough, mocking tone. Calls Elmia 'nhóc' (kid). Uses mày/tao with Elmia.
character_voices.<user> (Commander): Strategic, encouraging. Uses tôi/cô with Elmia.

notes: EN asset uses fullwidth ，(U+FF0C) inside text fields — VI follows same convention
Title: エルミアの弓と聖剣奪還作戦 → Chiến Dịch Thu Hồi Cung Và Thánh Kiếm Của Elmia (Vietnamese Title Case)
EN 'boss' (seq37) rendered as 'Chỉ Huy' — JP source has <user>
EN 'Elmia and the Commander' (seq47 narration) follows JP エルミア達 — rendered as 'Elmia và Chỉ Huy'
